calendarNotes:
Northside ISD begins the 2025-2026 school year on August 11, 2025 — the same start date as Houston ISD and Fort Worth ISD. Spring Break runs March 9–13, 2025, and the school year ends May 21, 2025. Like all Texas districts, Northside ISD starts the school year well before most districts in the Northeast and West Coast. The Spring Break timing (second week of March) is among the earlier windows in Texas, roughly a week before Dallas ISD, Austin ISD, and Fort Worth ISD.

Northside ISD observes the Battle of Flowers holiday on April 23, 2026 — a no-school day tied to San Antonio's Fiesta celebration, one of the city's largest annual events. The Battle of Flowers parade and Fiesta week are deeply woven into San Antonio civic culture and are not widely known outside Texas. Families relocating from out of state may not see this holiday on national school calendar guides. Mark April 23 as a student holiday — it applies regardless of which San Antonio district your child attends, as Fiesta is observed across Bexar County.

The San Antonio metro is served by several large independent school districts in addition to Northside ISD, including San Antonio ISD (the urban core), North East ISD, Alamo Heights ISD, and Judson ISD. These districts set their own academic calendars, and Spring Break dates vary slightly across the metro — Northside's March 9–13 window may differ from neighboring districts by a day or two. Families with children in multiple Bexar County districts should verify each calendar independently.

San Antonio hosts the largest concentration of military installations in any U.S. city, including Joint Base San Antonio (Lackland Air Force Base, Fort Sam Houston, and Randolph Air Force Base). Northside ISD serves a significant number of military families and is experienced with mid-year enrollment, PCS transfers, and expedited school placement. Military families arriving at a JBSA installation should contact Northside ISD's enrollment office promptly — the district can often place students within days of arrival.
